display.purpose: Page titles only (dashboard H1, section top heading).

data.purpose: Key metrics and currency readouts; tabular figures.

label.purpose: Form labels, helper text, badges, table headers; sentence case.

shadows.name: resting
shadows.purpose: Default for cards, inputs, rows; the 1px seam border defines the edge.

shadows.name: lifted-readout
shadows.purpose: The few primary stat instruments that should read as elevated.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: Modals, menus, tooltips, day-detail popovers — surfaces that leave the plane.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single high-emphasis action per view.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #319795; color: #F7FAFC; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font: 500 0.875rem Inter, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #2C7A7B; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #234E52; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #050b13, 0 0 0 4px #319795; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: #319795; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid #2D3748; border-radius: 8px; font: 500 0.875rem Inter, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms, border-color 150ms; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(49,151,149,0.12); border-color: #319795; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #319795; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text/number field on a slate panel.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #0f172a; color: #F7FAFC; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #2D3748; border-radius: 8px; font: 400 1rem Inter, sans-serif; width: 100%; transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #A0AEC0; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #319795; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(49,151,149,0.5); }

components.name: Card / Panel
components.description: Standard surface; seam-first, no resting shadow.
components.html:
Top 3 medios de venta

Participacion por ingresos en el periodo.
components.css: .ds-card { background: rgba(15,23,42,0.85); border: 1px solid #2D3748; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; } .ds-card-title { font: 700 1.5rem Inter, sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #F7FAFC; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card-body { font: 400 1rem Inter, sans-serif; color: #A0AEC0; margin: 0; }

components.name: Stat Readout Card
components.description: Signature dashboard instrument: label, tabular data number, helper, tinted icon badge.
components.html: Total facturado$1.240.50038 ventas en el periodo
components.css: .ds-stat { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 24px; background: rgba(15,23,42,0.85); border: 1px solid #2D3748; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 8px 10px -6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); } .ds-stat-text { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .ds-stat-label { font: 500 0.875rem Inter, sans-serif; color: #A0AEC0; } .ds-stat-value { font: 600 1.5rem Inter, sans-serif; font-feature-settings: 'tnum' 1; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #4FD1C5; } .ds-stat-help { font: 400 0.875rem Inter, sans-serif; color: #A0AEC0; } .ds-stat-badge { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(79,209,197,0.16); flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Badge / Chip
components.description: Semantic pill for status and priority.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font: 500 0.875rem Inter, sans-serif; } .ds-badge-warning { background: rgba(221,107,32,0.18); color: #F6AD55; } .ds-badge-success { background: rgba(56,161,105,0.18); color: #68D391; } .ds-badge-danger { background: rgba(229,62,62,0.18); color: #FEB2B2; }

components.name: Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation row; quiet default, cyan hover/active.
components.html: Inicio
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; padding: 16px; margin: 0 16px; border-radius: 8px; color: #F7FAFC; text-decoration: none; font: 400 1rem Inter, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms, color 150ms; } .ds-nav-item:hover, .ds-nav-item[aria-current="page"] { background: #0BC5EA; color: #ffffff; }

narrative.overview: Costify is the control cabin of a small maker business. The owner sits down to answer one concrete question and the interface answers it without ceremony. Every instrument is legible at a glance, every control is where the hand expects it, nothing flashes for attention it hasn't earned. The mood is calm-under-pressure: dark-first, dense where the data warrants, unshakably trustworthy. The figures are the product; the chrome gets out of their way. A single confident teal carries every primary action, selection, and live state.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first navy cockpit; light mode is a faithful mirror, not a downgrade.
One teal voice for action, selection, and state — reserved, never decorative.
Numbers rendered with tabular figures and clear hierarchy; data is the hero.
One typeface (Inter) across headings, labels, body, and data — no display pairing.
Calm motion: 150-250 ms, conveying state, never choreography.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Cockpit Teal is the only accent that signals action and state. It appears on a small fraction of any screen; its rarity is what makes a primary button or selected row read instantly. Never decoration.

rules.name: The Readout Rule
rules.body: Muted grey (#A0AEC0 on dark, #4A5568 on light) is the lightest text may go, and only for secondary copy. Body text and figures use Instrument White / Hull Ink. If a number is hard to read, add contrast, never a lighter grey.

rules.name: The Reserved-State Rule
rules.body: Green, Amber, and Red carry meaning, never style. Do not introduce a fourth or fifth decorative hue.

rules.name: The Tabular Money Rule
rules.body: Every figure a user compares uses tabular-figure Inter so money columns align. Proportional digits in a money column are a defect.

rules.name: The Sentence-Case Rule
rules.body: Labels and headers are sentence case. Tiny uppercase letter-tracked eyebrow labels are prohibited as default scaffolding.

rules.name: The Seam-First Rule
rules.body: A surface is defined by its 1px Panel Seam border and a tonal step above the background, not by a drop shadow. Reach for shadow only when a surface truly floats.

dos: Do keep Costify dark-mode-first; treat light mode as a fully-working mirror with the same contrast guarantees (>=4.5:1 body, >=3:1 large) in both modes.
Do use Cockpit Teal (#319795) as the single action/state voice and nothing decorative.
Do render every comparable figure in tabular-figure Inter so money columns align.
Do load Inter once and reference it via the Chakra theme (fonts.heading / fonts.body); delete the inline fontFamily strings.
Do define surfaces with a 1px Panel Seam border and a tonal step; add shadow only to floating surfaces and the single most important instrument.
Do give every interactive control a visible focus ring and full keyboard reachability; honor prefers-reduced-motion.
Do keep motion at 150-250 ms and tie it to state, never page-load choreography.
donts: Don't make it cutesy or toy-like: no oversized rounded-everything, no mascots, no bouncy/elastic motion.
Don't reach for the generic AI/SaaS template: no gradient hero metrics, no tiny uppercase letter-tracked eyebrows over every section, no endless identical icon+number card grids.
Don't let body text or figures fade to muted grey for elegance — Readout Grey is the floor and only for secondary copy.
Don't introduce a fourth/fifth decorative hue, and don't reference Chakra color scales that don't exist (indigo.*, lime.* silently fail).
Don't ship _focus={{ boxShadow: 'none' }} on interactive elements — it kills keyboard visibility.
Don't nest a card inside a card with the same treatment; step the tone or drop the inner border.
Don't use border-left/border-right > 1px as a colored accent stripe.
